waypoints.note: Polish Navy ; ex-HMS Dragon transferred to the Polish Navy in 1943. On station with Bombarding Force D.
Opens 6-inch fire in support of Sword sector ; first major Polish naval action against the German army on the European mainland since 1939.
Continues call-fire support. Sunk by a Marder human-torpedo off Sword on 8 July 1944 (post-MVP).
